text: Not later than the 11th day before the effective date of a suspension under Section 601.159 (Procedures for Suspension of Driver’s License and Vehicle Registration or Privilege) , the department shall send notice of the suspension to each affected owner or operator. The department shall send the notice by first class mail or by e-mail to any owner or operator who has provided an e-mail address to the department and who has elected to receive notice electronically. markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 601. Motor Vehicle Safety Responsibility Act
##### § 601.161 — Notice of Suspension

Not later than the 11th day before the effective date of a suspension under Section 601.159 (Procedures for Suspension of Driver’s License and Vehicle Registration or Privilege) , the department shall send notice of the suspension to each affected owner or operator. The department shall send the notice by first class mail or by e-mail to any owner or operator who has provided an e-mail address to the department and who has elected to receive notice electronically. The notice must state the amount required as security under Section 601.153 (Deposit of Security; Evidence of Financial Responsibility) and the necessity for the owner or operator to file evidence of financial responsibility with the department.

*Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1079 (H.B.3376), Sec. 9, eff. September 1, 2017.*
